path.description: The path to a working directory of a local repository.

generateTargetBranch.description: Indicates whether to push to a new remote branch. A value of 'true' is mutually exclusive with 'targetBranch'. If neither is provided, the target branch will be the currently checked out branch.

targetBranch.description: The target branch to push to. Mutually exclusive with 'generateTargetBranch=true'. If neither is provided, the target branch will be the currently checked out branch.

force.description: Whether to force push to the target branch, overwriting any existing history.

maxAttempts.description: The maximum number of attempts to push. Each attempt integrates remote changes (if applicable) and retries the API-based push. If not specified, the default is 10.

insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: Whether to skip TLS verification when communicating with the GitHub API. Intended for GitHub Enterprise instances with self-signed certificates.
